name: query-index-exports
description: Add execution module and PostgresBackend exports to top-level query module index
acceptanceCriteria: query/index.ts re-exports ISqlExecutor and SqlExecutorConfig types from execution/
query/index.ts re-exports BunSqlExecutor class from execution/
query/index.ts re-exports snakeToCamel, camelToSnake, normalizeRow, normalizeRows from execution/
All exports follow existing pattern in query/index.ts
